---
title: "Publications"
page-layout: full
listing:
  contents: _data/publications.json
  type: default
  template: assets/pub-card.ejs
  sort: ["date desc"]
  categories: numbered
  filter-ui: true
  sort-ui: [date, cites, impact_factor]
  page-size: 50
  fields: [title, author, journal, year, doi, cites, impact_factor, abstract, wos_id, scopus_id, scholar_id]
---

```{r setup}
#| include: false
invisible(try(targets::tar_read(site_pubs_json), silent = TRUE))
```

Peer-reviewed journal articles, drawn from BibTeX and enriched with
citation counts from Google Scholar and journal impact factors. Use the
sidebar to filter by year.
